global.description: The ad features a blue background with layered text and shapes promoting a travel offer.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel deal for hotels and flights.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Circular shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping circular shapes in lighter shades of blue, adding depth to the background.

elements.label: Main text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Escape this weekend' positioned centrally.

elements.label: Subtext
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main text that reads 'Hotels + flights in one tap'.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Start now' in white, set against a blue background.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A smaller circular shape in the background, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: Additional rectangle
elements.description: A rectangular shape in the background, enhancing the visual layout.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle shape positioned towards the bottom left of the canvas.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: Another small circle shape positioned slightly above the previous one.

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: Bold text at the bottom of the canvas stating 'SALE DriftPass' with a yellow highlight.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: Large, bold text at the top of the canvas reading 'DriftPass' in black.
